title: Sick Leave Policy and Reporting Absences
text:
Q: What is the sick leave policy and how do I report an absence?
A: Our sick leave policy allows employees to take time off due to illness or medical appointments. Employees are entitled to up to 10 days of paid sick leave per calendar year. If you are unable to work due to illness, please notify your supervisor as soon as possible, ideally at least one hour before your scheduled start time. You can report your absence via email or by calling your supervisor directly. For absences longer than three consecutive days, a doctor's note may be required upon your return. Please ensure that you complete the Sick Leave Request Form and submit it to HR within five business days of your return. If you have any questions or need assistance, contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
